mapper.insert: INSERT INTO csrq_header ( id, doc_no, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, branch, internal_supplier_store, notes, status, created_by, created_method, reference_no, released_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{docNo}, #{company}, #{store}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierContract}, #{branch}, #{internalSupplierStore}, #{notes}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdMethod}, #{referenceNo}, #{releasedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO csrq_detail (id, csrq_id, item_code, request_qty, request_uom) VALUES (#{id}, #{csrqId}, #{itemCode}, #{requestQty}, #{requestUom})
mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_no, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, branch, internal_supplier_store, notes, status, created_by, created_method, reference_no, released_at, created_at, updated_at FROM csrq_header WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT h.id, h.doc_no, h.company, h.store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, h.branch, h.internal_supplier_store, h.notes, h.status, h.created_by, h.created_method, h.reference_no, h.released_at, h.created_at, h.updated_at FROM csrq_header h LEFT JOIN csrq_detail d ON d.csrq_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR h.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{supplierContract} IS NULL OR h.supplier_contract = #{supplierContract}) AND (#{branch} IS NULL OR h.branch = #{branch}) AND (#{internalSupplierStore} IS NULL OR h.internal_supplier_store = #{internalSupplierStore}) AND (#{createdMethod} IS NULL OR h.created_method = #{createdMethod}) AND (#{referenceNo} IS NULL OR h.reference_no = #{referenceNo}) AND (#{itemCode} IS NULL OR d.item_code = #{itemCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
SELECT id, csrq_id, item_code, request_qty, request_uom FROM csrq_detail WHERE csrq_id = #{csrqId} ORDER BY item_code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE csrq_header SET status = #{status}, released_at = #{releasedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
